content.rendered:
2026 begins with a new Winter issue of IFR Magazine!
Find the latest edition of IFR Magazine; online, in Helijet Terminals, onboard the aircraft, and at some fine local Hotel partners.

In This Issue:

  • Celebrating a Helijet’s Pilot’s career milestone.
  • Wildlife Photographer, Cinematographer and Director John Banovich adds author to his career.
  • Helijet Joins Aeroplan!
  • Building Hope with Jesse’s House, Nanaimo
  • Find Your Next Spa-cation.
  • Find out What’s On in Vancouver, Victoria and Nanaimo this Season.
